tool_descriptions.run_qc_filtering: Quality control and cell filtering based on gene counts, UMI counts, and mitochondrial percentage
tool_descriptions.run_normalization_sct: SCTransform normalization with variance stabilization and feature selection
tool_descriptions.run_integration_harmony: Harmony batch correction and integration for multi-sample datasets
tool_descriptions.run_clustering_analysis: Graph-based clustering using Leiden or Louvain algorithms
tool_descriptions.run_deg_analysis: Differential expression gene analysis between groups
tool_descriptions.run_marker_detection: Marker gene detection for all clusters using FindAllMarkers
tool_descriptions.run_pathway_enrichment: GO and KEGG pathway enrichment analysis using clusterProfiler
tool_descriptions.run_dim_reduction: Dimensionality reduction (PCA, UMAP, tSNE) for visualization
tool_descriptions.run_subset_cells: Subset cells based on metadata criteria
